commands.review_summary:
The PR makes menu-open provider refresh deferral conditional on visible data needing a missing/stale retry and adds focused StatusMenu tests for fresh and missing-data opens.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main unconditionally marks a deferred provider refresh pending when scheduleOpenMenuRefresh runs, and the existing seeded test fixture provides a fresh Codex snapshot. I did not run tests because this is a read-only review.
